results.question: Are at least 3 topic JSON files present with all 3 quiz types?

evidence.findings: 3 topic JSON files present. javascript-basics: single+multi+flashcard. world-history: single+multi+flashcard. human-biology: single+multi+flashcard. All study plans have 2+ steps.

results.examiner_notes: Content is comprehensive and covers all required quiz types.

results.question: Does content normalization correctly validate and map to Topic type?

evidence.findings: normalizeTopic validates slug, title, description as strings (returns null if missing), provides defaults for tags, quiz, studyPlan. loadAllTopicsSync reads from public/content/ at build time.

results.examiner_notes: Type validation is correct with safe defaults.

results.question: Does storage abstraction handle localStorage unavailability gracefully?

evidence.findings: isStorageAvailable() tries setItem/removeItem in try/catch. readItem returns defaultValue on error or null. writeItem silently fails. StorageWarning component shows banner when unavailable.

results.question: Does Topics page show All Topics and My Topics tabs with correct content?

evidence.findings: Topics page uses Chakra Tabs with All Topics and My Topics panels. All topics loaded via getStaticProps using loadAllTopicsSync. My Topics filters by selectedSlugs. Empty state with CTA rendered when no topics selected.

results.examiner_notes: Tab UI works correctly. E2E tests confirm functionality.

results.question: Does topic selection persist in localStorage using lp_selectedTopics_v1?

evidence.findings: STORAGE_KEYS.selectedTopics = 'lp_selectedTopics_v1'. useSelectedTopics hook reads on mount and writes on toggle. Persistence verified by E2E test that refreshes page and checks selected topic still present.

results.question: Do all 6 Story 02 Playwright E2E tests pass?

evidence.findings: 6/6 tests pass: topic display (2), topic selection (1), persistence (1), deselection (1), empty state (1).

results.examiner_notes: All tests pass after fixing tab-scoped selectors.

results.question: Do all Story 01 E2E tests still pass?

evidence.findings: 6/6 Story 01 tests still pass. No regressions.

test_gate.evidence: Build passes. /topics compiled as SSG with 3 topics. All 12 E2E tests pass (6 story-01 + 6 story-02).
